title: [INFRA] Remove ibr-web from mishal-one-web directory — 3.4GB nested repo
notes: Separate git repo accidentally nested. Already gitignored. rm -rf or mv to monorepo root.

title: [ARCH] Decide CMS — Payload vs Sanity — gates 10 downstream items
notes: See docs/cms-evaluation.md. Payload: self-hosted, forms, paywalls, $5-10/mo, Cloudflare D1 template. Sanity: managed, best media CDN, $0-99/mo. Decision blocks BL-003 through BL-006, BL-014, BL-021, BL-022. Need to evaluate: batteries-included setup, previous Payload failure, GHL integration pattern.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS with blog collection — posts CRUD + Astro fetch
notes: Install chosen CMS. Create blog/posts collection: title, slug, body, publishDate, author, featuredImage, tags, status, accessLevel. Wire Astro to fetch via REST/GROQ. Migrate hello-world post.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS media library — uploads + CDN + Astro Picture
notes: Payload: R2 via cloud-storage plugin. Sanity: built-in CDN with focal points. Wire Astro <Picture> to render CMS images with AVIF/WebP.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS pages collection — about, speaking, how-I-work
notes: Fields: title, slug, body, seoTitle, seoDescription, ogImage. Dynamic route src/pages/[...slug].astro. Baker signals 4, 9, 10.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS testimonials collection — quote + attribution
notes: Fields: quote, authorName, authorRole, company, companyUrl, photo. Baker signal 12. Schema.org Review markup.

title: [OPS] Set up Go High Level account + API key + pipeline
notes: GHL Starter $97/mo. Create Bearer token. Store in .env as GHL_API_KEY. Create pipeline: Website Leads. Tags: blog-lead, newsletter-subscriber. See docs/go-high-level-integration.md.

title: [WEB] Build lead capture form component — GHL API + UTM capture
notes: LeadCaptureForm.astro. Fields: email, firstName. Captures UTMs from URL. POSTs to GHL contacts/upsert via Cloudflare Function. Success/error states. Inline on blog + landing. Progressive enhancement.

title: [OPS] Create GHL welcome email workflow — drip sequence
notes: Trigger: tag blog-lead. Actions: wait 2min → welcome email → wait 3d → best-of email. Brand palette in templates (Navy/Gold).

title: [OPS] Set up UTM tracking convention + attribution
notes: Document UTM naming convention. All social links include UTMs. Form submissions pass UTMs to GHL contact. PostHog captures same UTMs. Critical: form must be on same landing page (GHL constraint).

title: [OPS] Set up Buttondown newsletter + RSS-to-email
notes: Create Buttondown account. Connect RSS feed. Auto-send on new post. Subscribe form on landing + blog footer. Brand template. GDPR compliant.

title: [WEB] Create RSS feed endpoint — @astrojs/rss
notes: Install @astrojs/rss. src/pages/rss.xml.ts. Generate from blog content collection or CMS API. Include title, description, pubDate, link, content. Validate at validator.w3.org/feed. Auto-discovery already in BaseHead.

title: [WEB] Add share buttons to blog posts — X, LinkedIn, copy-link
notes: ShareButtons.astro with Lucide icons. Pure URL-based sharing (no third-party JS). Pre-populate tweet/post text with title + URL.

title: [OPS] Set up auto-post to X on CMS publish — webhook chain
notes: CMS afterChange webhook → GHL workflow or Cloudflare Worker → X API v2 POST. Tweet: title + URL + 2 hashtags. Requires X developer account with write access.

title: [OPS] Set up PostHog for content analytics
notes: PostHog JS snippet on all pages. Track: page views, blog reads, form submits, newsletter signups, share clicks. Dashboard: content performance + funnel (visit→read→subscribe→lead). UTM props.

title: [WEB] Build /brand page skeleton — 8 sections from spec
notes: See docs/backlog.md BRAND-001. Colour palette reads from design tokens. Typography shows Artifika + Atkinson. Monogram placeholder for logo. Components: ColourSwatch, ColourPalette, AssetCard, UsageRule. noindex until ready.

title: [WEB] Add location to footer — Baker Signal 5
notes: Add 'Based in Australia' to Footer.astro. Builds trust and geographic credibility per Baker framework. Quick win.

title: [WEB] Make newsletter signup the primary CTA — Baker Signal 3
notes: Newsletter signup is the most prominent CTA on landing page. Not 'Contact Us'. Gold accent button. Connected to Buttondown or GHL. Success state.

title: [WEB] Create About page — ICP + positioning — Baker Signals 8,9,10
notes: Tight focus, ICP description, diagnostic/roadmap. Not a resume — a positioning statement. Person schema JSON-LD. Requires CMS pages collection.

title: [WEB] Create Speaking page — Baker Signal 4
notes: Topics, bio (short+long), downloadable portraits, past appearances. Shows demand. Requires CMS pages collection.

title: [OPS] Set up content scheduling — CMS + cron builds
notes: CMS scheduled publishing. GitHub Actions cron or Cloudflare scheduled worker rebuilds every 6h. Posts with future publishDate auto-appear. Manual rebuild trigger available.

title: [OPS] Create batch content workflow — end-to-end automated pipeline
notes: Batch create 4 posts → staggered publish dates → cron rebuilds → RSS updates → Buttondown sends → GHL tracks → PostHog measures. Document and test with real content. Depends on: BL-003, BL-011, BL-012, BL-021.

title: [WEB] Generate OG images per blog post — Satori + Sharp
notes: Build-time OG image generation. Template: Navy bg, Gold title, author, URL. 1200x630px. Unique per post. Fallback og-placeholder.png.

title: [WEB] Extend structured data — BreadcrumbList + FAQPage
notes: Add BreadcrumbList on /blog/* pages. FAQPage where applicable. Validate at validator.schema.org. No errors in Google Rich Results Test.

title: [ARCH] Research paywalled content approach — tiers + payment
notes: Define what's paywalled (reports? templates?). Choose: Payload field-level access + Stripe, or Gumroad/LemonSqueezy. Document in docs/paywall-strategy.md. Research only, no implementation.

title: [WEB] Update social links — replace LinkedIn PLACEHOLDER
notes: Replace PLACEHOLDER LinkedIn URL in src/config.ts. Verify all links working: X, GitHub (mishaal79), GitHub (QriusGlobal), LinkedIn, Email. Update llms.txt.

title: [OPS] Remove noindex when site is ready — go live
notes: Remove noindex from BaseHead for public pages. Keep noindex on 404. Sitemap includes all public pages. Submit Google Search Console.

title: [OPS] Deploy to Cloudflare Pages production — mishal.one live
notes: bun run deploy. Verify: SSL, headers, robots.txt, sitemap, llms.txt. Lighthouse >90. No console errors. Cloudflare caching configured.

title: [SEC] Configure Cloudflare security headers — CSP, HSTS, XSS
notes: Missing from 12-dimension audit. Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security. Via _headers file or Cloudflare dashboard.

title: [QA] Integration test — full content pipeline end-to-end
notes: Lifecycle item. Test: CMS create → publish → build → site renders → RSS valid → newsletter sends → GHL contact created → PostHog event fires.

title: [DOCS] Document content operations runbook
notes: How to: create a post, schedule it, check analytics, handle newsletter bounce, troubleshoot failed builds. Operational runbook for 4hrs/week cadence.

title: [OPS] Set up monitoring — health check + uptime
notes: 12-dimension gap. Cloudflare analytics or external uptime monitor (Betterstack free tier). Alert on downtime. Build failure notifications via GitHub Actions.

title: [OPS] Budget tracking — monthly cost cap and alerts
notes: 12-dimension gap. Track: Cloudflare ($0), GHL ($97), Buttondown ($0-15), domain ($15/yr). Set spending alerts. Document in docs/budget.md.
